---
title: "周邊血管 — Peripheral Vascular"
---

## 教學講義 Handouts

- [頸動脈支架（CAS）完整文獻回顧](carotid-stenting-review/index.qmd)


## LaTeX Files

- Advanced Materials Carotid Artery Chip 3D Printing 2026 教學講義.tex
- NEJM CREST-2 2026.tex
- NEJM Ischemic Limb Gangrene with Pulses 2015 教學講義.tex
- NEJM PAD Review McDermott 2026 教學講義.tex
- NHMRC Carotid Web RBC Thrombosis 2026 教學講義.tex
